title: SEO ping logging and compliance improvements for blog publishing
scope: Log all sitemap pings and Search Console snapshot hints when posts are published
Expose a read-only admin endpoint for SEO ping logs
Strengthen AI blog prompt SEO and compliance guidance
Ensure publish flows trigger Search Console pings consistently
acceptance_criteria: Publishing a blog post records a Search Console ping log entry
Ping logs capture sitemap URL, status, and Search Console summary or errors
Admin API exposes recent ping logs for monitoring
AI-generated blog posts include SEO-friendly structure and compliance guidance
CHANGELOG.md includes an entry for this work order
risk_notes: Search Console snapshots require credentials; logs will mark them unconfigured when missing
rollback_plan: Drop the seo_ping_logs table and revert SEO ping logging changes
